BUILDING FUTURE INNOVATORS

Curricular technology innovation & is an international organization in tech specialized in technical training and certification. We operate internationally to accelerate personal career and development goals and meet corporate requirements.

Learn by doing

Experiential learning is at the heart of Aether Education Academy, as it empowers students to apply what they've learned to solve problems, make decisions, and achieve business outcomes.

Join our Community

Tech Academy Community is a space where our students, mentors, and experts from the tech ecosystem meet to collaborate, learn, and develop projects that are helpful to the local and global communities.

Our Journey:

Founded 1999

Launch Mentorship
Global Corporate Partnerships
Launch Community Connection
Reach 1M Mentorship sessions
Expansion of global learning platforms
